description: Workflow for processing subscriber entities to fetch and add cat facts weekly
name: subscriber_cat_fact_workflow

transitions.description: Start processing the subscriber entity by fetching a cat fact
transitions.end_state_description: Cat fact has been fetched and stored temporarily
transitions.name: start_processing

externalized_processors.description: Fetch cat fact from external API and store it temporarily
externalized_processors.name: processFetchCatFact

transitions.description: Add the fetched cat fact to the subscriber entity and remove temporary storage
transitions.end_state_description: Cat fact added to entity final attribute
transitions.name: add_cat_fact_to_entity

externalized_processors.description: Move temporary cat fact to final attribute and clean up
externalized_processors.name: processAddCatFactToEntity

transitions.start_state_description: Cat fact has been fetched and stored temporarily

transitions.description: Mark the subscriber entity as processed and update version
transitions.end_state_description: Entity marked as processed with updated version
transitions.name: mark_entity_processed
transitions.start_state_description: Cat fact added to entity final attribute
